S

save(Appointment) - Method in interface org.example.repository.AppointmentBookingRepository
Saves one appointment record.
save(Appointment) - Method in class org.example.repository.InMemoryAppointmentBookingRepository
Saves one appointment in memory.

Saves a user record.
save(SystemUser) - Method in interface org.example.repository.UserRepository
Saves a user record.
save(WaitlistEntry) - Method in class org.example.repository.InMemoryWaitlistRepository
Saves a waitlist entry.
save(WaitlistEntry) - Method in interface org.example.repository.WaitlistRepository
Saves a waitlist entry.
saveFirst(WaitlistEntry) - Method in class org.example.repository.InMemoryWaitlistRepository
Restores a waitlist entry to the front of the queue.
saveFirst(WaitlistEntry) - Method in interface org.example.repository.WaitlistRepository
Restores a waitlist entry to the front of the queue.
send(String, String, String) - Method in class org.example.notification.EmailNotificationService
Sends a notification to the given recipient.
send(String, String, String) - Method in interface org.example.notification.NotificationService
Sends a notification to the given recipient.
sendAllReminders() - Method in class org.example.service.AppointmentService
Sends reminders for all booked slots.
sendApprovedNotification(Appointment) - Method in class org.example.service.AppointmentNotificationCoordinator
Sends an approved notification for an approved appointment.
sendAttendedNotification(Appointment) - Method in class org.example.service.AppointmentNotificationCoordinator
Sends a notification for an attended appointment.
sendCancelledNotification(Appointment) - Method in class org.example.service.AppointmentNotificationCoordinator
Sends a cancelled notification for a cancelled or rejected appointment.
sendCompletedNotification(Appointment) - Method in class org.example.service.AppointmentNotificationCoordinator
Sends a notification for a completed appointment.
sendModifiedNotification(Appointment) - Method in class org.example.service.AppointmentNotificationCoordinator
Sends a modified notification for an updated appointment.
sendNotAttendedNotification(Appointment) - Method in class org.example.service.AppointmentNotificationCoordinator
Sends a notification for a missed appointment.
sendPendingNotification(Appointment) - Method in class org.example.service.AppointmentNotificationCoordinator
Sends a pending notification for a newly booked appointment.
sendReminderForSlot(String) - Method in class org.example.service.AppointmentService
Sends a reminder for one booked slot that matches the given selection.
sendRescheduledNotification(Appointment, Appointment) - Method in class org.example.service.AppointmentNotificationCoordinator
Sends a detailed reschedule notification with old/new appointment details.
sendWaitlistPromotionNotification(Appointment) - Method in class org.example.service.AppointmentNotificationCoordinator
Sends a notification for a waitlisted appointment that has been promoted.

Stores login session details for the current user.

Updates the feedback comment.

Updates the feedback submitted flag.
setRating(int) - Method in class org.example.domain.Appointment
Updates the feedback rating.
setType(AppointmentType) - Method in class org.example.domain.Appointment
Updates the type.

Starts this part of the application.
submitFeedback(String, int, String) - Method in class org.example.service.AppointmentBookingService
Submits feedback for the current user's own completed appointment.

Submits feedback for the current user's own completed appointment.
subscribe(Observer) - Method in class org.example.service.EventManager
Adds an observer if it is not null and not already subscribed.
success() - Static method in class org.example.service.AuthenticationAttemptResult
Creates a successful result without user details.
success(String, UserRole) - Static method in class org.example.service.AuthenticationAttemptResult
